IF OBJECT_ID('staging.sp_load_visits_delta', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE staging.sp_load_visits_delta;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE staging.sp_load_visits_delta
    @load_run_id VARCHAR(100)
AS
BEGIN
    DECLARE @last_watermark DATETIME2;

    SELECT @last_watermark = LastProcessedValue
    FROM config.WatermarkControl
    WHERE ProjectName = 'waittime'
      AND LoadType = 'INCREMENTAL'
      AND TargetTable = 'visits';

    TRUNCATE TABLE staging.visits_delta;

    INSERT INTO staging.visits_delta
    (
        visit_id,
        patient_id,
        visit_date,
        source_file,
        load_run_id,
        created_at_utc
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.visit_id)) AS INT)        AS visit_id,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.patient_id)) AS INT)      AS patient_id,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.visit_date)) AS DATE)     AS visit_date,
        b.filename                                       AS source_file,
        @load_run_id                                     AS load_run_id,
        GETUTCDATE()                                     AS created_at_utc
    FROM bronze.visits b
    WHERE
        @last_watermark IS NULL
        OR TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.visit_date)) AS DATETIME2) > @last_watermark;
END;
GO


IF OBJECT_ID('staging.sp_load_orders_delta', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE staging.sp_load_orders_delta;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE staging.sp_load_orders_delta
    @load_run_id VARCHAR(100)
AS
BEGIN
    DECLARE @last_watermark DATETIME2;

    SELECT @last_watermark = LastProcessedValue
    FROM config.WatermarkControl
    WHERE ProjectName = 'demo'
      AND LoadType = 'INCREMENTAL'
      AND TargetTable = 'orders';

    TRUNCATE TABLE staging.orders_delta;

    INSERT INTO staging.orders_delta
    (
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        product_id,
        quantity,
        order_date,
        source_file,
        load_run_id,
        created_at_utc
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.order_id)) AS INT)        AS order_id,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.customer_id)) AS INT)     AS customer_id,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.product_id)) AS INT)      AS product_id,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.quantity)) AS INT)        AS quantity,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.order_date)) AS DATE)     AS order_date,
        b.filename                                       AS source_file,
        @load_run_id                                     AS load_run_id,
        GETUTCDATE()                                     AS created_at_utc
    FROM bronze.orders b
    WHERE
        @last_watermark IS NULL
        OR TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.order_date)) AS DATETIME2) > @last_watermark;
END;
GO
